nasb.text: This they will have in return for their pride, because they have taunted and become arrogant against the people of the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: This shall be their lot in return for their pride, because they taunted and boasted against the people of the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 由於他們的狂傲，這事就臨到他們；因為他們自誇自大，辱罵萬軍之耶和華的子民。

ccb.text: 这是他们的报应， 因为他们狂妄自大， 毁谤万军之耶和华的子民。
